name: CloudCat
description: Authoring contract for the CloudCat Rive file. Export the real binary file as cloudcat_state_machine.riv in this folder.

state.description: 0 idle, 1 listen, 2 low, 3 hug, 4 tearing, 5 happy

emotion.description: 0 neutral, 1 tired, 2 anxious, 3 wronged, 4 annoyed, 5 happy

isPetting.description: True while the user is tapping or pressing the cat

listen.description: Fire when the cat starts listening

tear.description: Fire when the cat starts tearing the emotion canvas

discover.description: Fire when the hidden happiness layer is discovered

pet.description: Fire when the user pets the cat

recommendedAnimations.name: IdleFloat
recommendedAnimations.notes: Slow breathing, tail/ear micro movement, soft blink.

recommendedAnimations.name: ListenNod
recommendedAnimations.notes: Head leans forward, ears attentive, small listening glow.

recommendedAnimations.name: LowBreath
recommendedAnimations.notes: Lower posture, slower breathing, dimmer aura.

recommendedAnimations.name: HugPulse
recommendedAnimations.notes: Warm protective pulse, body curls inward.

recommendedAnimations.name: TearCanvas
recommendedAnimations.notes: Paw pulling motion and stronger body effort.

recommendedAnimations.name: HappyBounce
recommendedAnimations.notes: Small bounce, bright eyes, celebratory sparkle.

recommendedAnimations.name: DiscoverLight
recommendedAnimations.notes: Bright reveal pulse when happiness is found.

jsIntegration.fallback: If the binary .riv is missing or cannot load, the page keeps using the existing PNG/CSS pet actor.
